message:
feat(engine): duplicate benchmark ID validation and extension_id config passthrough

Two independent improvements to the execution and benchmarking
infrastructure:

1. Benchmark duplicate ID detection:
   - Add DuplicateBenchmarkId error variant to BenchmarkComparisonError
   - validate_benchmark_comparison_manifest() now rejects manifests where
     two cases share the same benchmark_id, preventing silent result
     clobbering during comparison runs
   - Integration test exercises the rejection path by cloning the first
     case and asserting the correct error variant

2. Extension ID passthrough:
   - ExecutionOrchestrator now propagates package.extension_id into both
     the QuickJs-inspired and V8-inspired InterpreterConfig, allowing
     the interpreter to attribute execution artifacts back to the
     originating extension

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
